hero.subtitle: Itineraya turns your travel dreams into personalized itineraries. Tell us your destination and let AI do the rest.

how.title: From idea to trip in 3 steps
how.subtitle: No spreadsheets, no late-night research. Plan your adventure in minutes.
how.step1Desc: Tell us where you want to go. A city, a country, or just 'beach in summer'.
how.step2Desc: Adjust dates, budget, travel style and preferences. Packed schedule or total relaxation.
how.step3Desc: AI builds a day-by-day plan with maps, schedules, bookings and local tips.

features.title: Everything you need to travel stress-free
features.subtitle: Cutting-edge tech with the warmth of a personal travel agent.
features.aiDesc: Our AI engine analyzes thousands of real-time signals to craft unique itineraries tailored to you.
features.mapDesc: Visualize your day-by-day route with built-in maps, directions and travel times between stops.
features.seasonDesc: Get recommendations based on the time of year: festivals, events and seasonal activities.
features.budgetDesc: AI balances quality and cost, suggesting alternatives so you travel your way without surprises.
features.worldDesc: From iconic cities to hidden corners. Works anywhere in the world.
features.shareDesc: Share your itinerary with friends, let them vote on activities and plan together.

testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of people already trust Itineraya to plan their adventures.
testimonials.t1Text: I planned my Bali trip in under 5 minutes. The itinerary was perfect, with activities I'd never have found on my own.
testimonials.t2Text: Amazing how the AI understands exactly what I'm looking for. My route through Japan was unforgettable, all perfectly organized.
testimonials.t3Text: The restaurants recommended for my Italy trip were spectacular. Itineraya understands what it means to travel with all your senses.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next trip?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers already planning with Itineraya. Your next adventure is one click away.

pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade whenever you want more itineraries, AI and advanced tools.
